column1: # Please read note at the bottom on ECP5U & ECP5UM migration
This table is to migrate between ECP5U and ECP5UM devices
The Serdes pins should be connected as below:

column2: SERDES power pins should be connected on ECP5U device, so when ECP5UM is used, power pins would be connected
SERDES HDin pins should be connected on ECP5U device as it would when it is replaced with ECP5UM device.
SERDES HDout pins should be connected on ECP5U device as it would when it is replaced with ECP5UM device.
SERDES Refclk pins should be connected on ECP5U device as it would when it is replaced with ECP5UM device.

column1: Migration is allowed between ECP5U and ECP5UM devices with different densities
